title: New sandbox
subtitle: Choose a template and configure resources to spin up a new micro-VM sandbox.

section.templateDesc: Only templates with status ready are selectable.
section.metadataDesc: Custom key-value pairs attached to the sandbox for identification and filtering.

form.autoPauseHint: Automatically pause the sandbox when there are no active connections.

compat.staleHelp: This template is stale in the current node environment. Rebuild it or adopt the current baseline before creating a sandbox.
